summaryPlaceholder.message: Click the button above to generate a page summary

interestsPlaceholder.message: Describe what interests you, e.g.: AI, macro economics...

matchesPlaceholder.message: Click the button above to find content matching your interests

floatBtnTooltip.message: Show floating action button in the bottom-right corner

connectionError.message: Cannot connect to the page. Please refresh and try again.

settingsSubtitle.message: Manage your API key and preferences

apiKeyPrivacy.message: Your API key is stored locally in your browser only and is never sent to any third-party server.

modelInfo.message: Select a model based on your needs. gpt-4o-mini is recommended for everyday use at $0.15/M tokens.

languageInfo.message: Choose the language for the extension's interface. Reloads automatically on save.

translateLangInfo.message: Page paragraphs will be translated into this language when using the float button.

floatBtnInfo.message: Show translation and highlight shortcut buttons in the bottom-right corner of web pages.

instructionStep1.message: Get an API Key from the OpenAI platform

instructionStep2.message: Paste your API Key above, choose a translation language and model, then save

instructionStep3.message: Click the extension icon on any page to open the sidebar — summarize content or find items matching your interests

instructionStep4.message: Use the float button in the bottom-right corner to translate visible paragraphs into your chosen language

invalidApiKey.message: Invalid API Key format, must start with "sk-"

confirmClear.message: Are you sure you want to clear all settings?

setInterestsFirst.message: Please set your interests in the extension first

extDescription.message: Reading assistant: translate pages and highlight content matching your interests

blockedDomainsInfo.message: The float button is hidden on these domains. Right-click the float button on any page to add it.
